# REQ-FR-260008: Comprehensive testing infrastructure for public site

- ID: FR-260008
- Class: FR (Functional Requirement)
- Status: Accepted
- Date: 2026-06-08
- Owner: Repository owner

## Statement

The public Crystord site project shall maintain a comprehensive testing infrastructure that includes unit testing, component testing, end-to-end testing, and static code analysis, aligned with the testing approach established in the crystord_web project, and shall backfill automated verification for already delivered BI-260001, BI-260002, and BI-260003 behavior.

## Rationale

A robust testing foundation prevents regressions, enables confident refactoring, enforces code quality standards, and provides automated validation of user journeys. Establishing this infrastructure before continuing feature development creates a quality gate and reduces technical debt.

## Acceptance Criteria

### Playwright E2E Testing
- Playwright installed as dev dependency (@playwright/test)
- playwright.config.ts configured with:
  - Test directory: `./e2e`
  - Base URL targeting Astro dev server
  - Browser matrix (at minimum: Chromium)
  - Web server auto-start configuration
  - CI-appropriate settings (retries, reporters)
- E2E test directory created with at least one sample test
- Test script `test:e2e` added to package.json

### Enhanced Vitest Configuration
- Vitest configured for component/integration testing
- Test environment appropriate for Astro components
- Test setup file configured if needed
- Test pattern includes `src/**/*.test.{ts,tsx}`
- Test scripts in package.json: `test` (run once), `test:watch` (watch mode)

### ESLint Static Analysis
- ESLint installed with Astro and TypeScript support
- eslint.config.js configured with appropriate rules
- Lint script added to package.json
- Type checking script (typecheck) added to package.json

### Documentation
- README or docs updated with:
  - How to run each test type
  - Testing philosophy and approach
  - How to write new tests

### Sample Tests
- Automated tests explicitly cover representative behavior delivered by BI-260001, BI-260002, and BI-260003
- At least one E2E test demonstrates BI-260003 navigation or routing flow
- At least one unit/component test demonstrates BI-260001 and/or BI-260002 behavior validation
- All tests passing
